title: Single cell metabolic profiling of tumor mimics.
author: Keithley RB Weaver EM Rosado AM Metzinger MP Hummon AB Dovichi NJ
content: S-EPMC3816011 PMC3816011 Single cell metabolic profiling of tumor mimics. Chemical cytometry employs modern analytical methods to study the differences in composition between single cells to better understand development, cellular differentiation, and disease.
